description: DevOps-specific hooks — block destructive Terraform and Kubernetes operations without review.

hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | node -pe "JSON.parse(require(\"fs\").readFileSync(0,\"utf8\")).tool_input.command || \"\"" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "terraform\s+apply" && ! echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "terraform\s+plan"; then echo "BLOCK: Run /tf-plan-review first. Never apply without reviewing the plan." >&2; exit 2; fi'

PreToolUse.description: Block terraform apply without prior plan review

hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | node -pe "JSON.parse(require(\"fs\").readFileSync(0,\"utf8\")).tool_input.command || \"\"" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "kubectl\s+(apply|delete).*--context.*(prod|production)"; then echo "BLOCK: Production kubectl operation detected. Switch to a non-prod context or confirm explicitly." >&2; exit 2; fi'

PreToolUse.description: Block kubectl apply/delete targeting production context

hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | node -pe "JSON.parse(require(\"fs\").readFileSync(0,\"utf8\")).tool_input.command || \"\"" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "terragrunt\s+(run-all\s+)?apply" && ! echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "terragrunt.*plan"; then echo "BLOCK: Run /terragrunt-plan first. Never run-all apply without reviewing the full plan." >&2; exit 2; fi'

PreToolUse.description: Block terragrunt apply/run-all apply without prior plan review

hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | node -pe "JSON.parse(require(\"fs\").readFileSync(0,\"utf8\")).tool_input.command || \"\"" 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "argocd\s+app\s+(sync|delete).*--project\s+prod"; then echo "[Hook] ArgoCD prod sync/delete detected — confirm rollback is ready." >&2; fi'

PreToolUse.description: Warn on ArgoCD sync/delete against production AppProject
